ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Chicken satay (73%) (chicken (86%), wheat flour, vegetable oils (rapeseed, sunflower), sugar, spices (mustard flour, cayenne pepper), salt, stabilisers (diphosphates, polyphosphates), yeast extract, garlic powder, soybeans, wheat, ginger powder, yeast, ginger extract), Sweet chilli dip (27%) (sugar, water, barley malt vinegar, cornflour, red chilli purée, garlic purée, salt, paprika, colour (paprika extract), preservative (potassium sorbate)).
